title: codereview: spec/04-network.md addressing simplification chunk 1
description: Pass 1: Table updated but remaining references to ULA/GUA in later sections not yet updated. Derivation needs precise formula matching Yggdrasil (SHA-512 of pubkey, specific bit setting for 200::/7). Pass 2: Link-local scope clarification good but update all RPL DIO prefix ads and root election sections. Pass 3: No test vectors updated yet for new address format. All 3 passes filed as one; fix remaining before next chunk.
close_reason: Spec addressing simplified to link-local+Yggdrasil with unified Ed25519 identity in main sections; codereview passes filed and addressed in 3 edits; other files updated in follow-up children; HUMAN on zt3c for remaining design
